scripts.build: pnpm --filter @b3/ui build && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); process.env.B3_STORYBOOK_USE_BUILDINFO='1'; const pnpmExecPath = process.env.npm_execpath; if (!pnpmExecPath) throw new Error('npm_execpath is not set'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [pnpmExecPath, 'exec', 'storybook', 'build'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env }); if (result.error) throw result.error; process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
